Sonti Varun
Mobile: 77021269325 | Email: sontivarun5@gmail.com | Location: Hyderabad, Telangana
Professional Summary
Detail-oriented Manual Test Engineer with 4 years of experience in software quality
assurance and testing across web, e-commerce, and enterprise applications. Skilled in
preparing test plans, writing test cases, executing functional, regression, and integration
tests, and defect tracking using Jira/TestRail. Strong understanding of SDLC and STLC with
hands-on experience in Agile/Scrum methodology. Adept at collaborating with cross-
functional teams to ensure high-quality product delivery.
Key Skills
• Testing Types: Functional, Regression, Smoke, Sanity, Integration, System, UAT, Testing
internationalization and localization, E-commerce Testing
• Test Management Tools: Jira, TestRail
• Bug Tracking: Jira
• Documentation: Test Cases, Test Scenarios, RTM (Requirement Traceability Matrix),
Defect Reports
• Other Skills: OMS Testing, API Testing, SQL Queries for DB validation
• Methodologies: Agile/Scrum, Waterfall
Professional Experience
Manual Test Engineer
Kopensoft
Jan 2021 – Present
• Responsibilities:
• Analyzed business/functional requirements and prepared test plans and test cases.
• Performed functional testing, regression testing, smoke/sanity testing, and
integration testing across different modules.
• Conducted e-commerce website testing, including cart, checkout, payment gateway,
order history, and translation validation.
• Validated OMS (Order Management System) integration for order flow, returns, and
refund scenarios.
• Prepared and maintained the Requirement Traceability Matrix (RTM) to ensure
complete coverage.

-- 1 of 4 --

• Logged and tracked defects in Jira and participated in defect triage meetings.
• Worked closely with developers, BA, and product owners in Agile sprint ceremonies
(daily stand-ups, sprint planning, and retrospectives).
• Prepared test summary reports after execution and shared test status with
stakeholders.
• Achievements:
• Improved test coverage by 30% by enhancing RTM practices.
• Identified several critical defects before release, reducing post-production issues
significantly.
• Appreciated by project manager for timely delivery of regression cycles during
critical releases.
Project Experience
E-Commerce Web Application Testing
Client: Samsung Duration: Jan 2023 – present
Description:
Tested an enterprise-level e-commerce website with features like product catalog, cart
management, payment gateway, order tracking, and OMS (Order Management System)
integration.
Roles & Responsibilities:
• Prepared detailed test scenarios and test cases based on functional requirements.
• Performed functional, regression, and integration testing on cart, checkout, and
order modules.
• Conducted internationalization and localization testing for multilingual support.
• Validated payment gateway integration (cards, wallets, UPI, net banking).
• Verified OMS integration for order placement, refunds, returns, and shipment
tracking.
• Reported and tracked bugs in Jira, collaborated with developers for fixes.
• Delivered test summary reports after each release.
Tools & Environment: Jira, TestRail, SQL, Agile Scrum

-- 2 of 4 --

Transport Management for Freight Forwarders
Client: BluJay Duration: March 2021 – Dec 2022
Description:
Worked on a Transport Management System (TMS) designed for freight forwarders to
manage shipments, bookings, tariff calculations, and return logistics. The application
enabled freight operators to streamline transport operations, manage surcharges, and
provide end-to-end shipment visibility.
Roles & Responsibilities:
• Analyzed functional specifications and designed test scenarios and test cases for
transport workflows.
• Performed functional, regression, integration, and system testing for modules like
shipment booking, tariff surcharge, and returns history.
• Verified freight calculations, tariff surcharges, and taxes for accuracy.
• Conducted end-to-end flow testing from booking to delivery including status
updates and return management.
• Tested user roles & permissions (admin, freight forwarder, customer) for system
access control.
• Validated OMS (Order Management System) integration for shipment data sync.
• Conducted UI testing to ensure field validations, dropdowns, and forms worked
correctly.
• Logged defects in Jira, collaborated with developers during defect triage meetings,
and retested after fixes.
• Prepared test execution reports and participated in Agile sprint ceremonies.
Tools & Environment: Jira, TestRail, SQL, Agile Scrum
Education
Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech) – CSE
Ace Engineering College, 2020
